items.quote: Clovai replaced three tools for us. The canvas is so fast that our architecture reviews moved from whiteboard photos to living diagrams.
items.author: Priya Sharma

items.quote: The ER designer produces diagrams our auditors actually compliment. That has never happened before — and I hear AI generation is coming next.
items.author: Marcus Chen

items.quote: We rolled Clovai out to 400 people in a week. SSO, SCIM and audit logs worked out of the box — our security team had nothing to add.
items.author: Elena Kovács

items.question: What is the Clovai Engine and when does it launch?
items.answer: The Clovai Engine is our upcoming multi-agent AI orchestration system: specialized agents plan, draw and lay out complete diagrams from plain language. It is in active development — join the waitlist from any plan and you'll get access the moment it ships.

items.question: Will my data be used to train AI models?
items.answer: No. Your diagrams and prompts will never be used for model training. Enterprise plans can additionally opt into EU-only data residency and zero-retention inference when the Clovai Engine launches.

items.question: Can I import existing diagrams?
items.answer: Import for Mermaid, PlantUML, draw.io, Lucidchart and Visio files is on the roadmap, alongside live schemas from SQL, Prisma and DBML for ER diagrams.

items.question: Does Clovai work offline?
items.answer: Yes — the canvas designer runs in your browser and your drafts autosave locally, so you can keep designing without a connection.

items.question: Can I cancel anytime?
items.answer: Yes. Downgrade or cancel from your billing page anytime — your diagrams stay accessible on the Free plan forever.

sections.title: Start turning ideas into diagrams today
sections.subtitle: Free forever for individuals. No credit card required.
